Oracc: HBTIN — Hellenistic Babylonia: Texts, Iconography, Names

YOS 20, 021 [Sale of house, passageway and animal pen][via hbtin]

Obverse
o 1o 1

[md60-ŠEŠ-LA₂ DUMU ša₂ mdna-na]-a-MU ina ⸢ḫu⸣-[ud lib₃-bi-šu₂ E₂ TUR₃ u mu-ṣu-u₂ KIti₃]

o 22

[E₂] ⸢d⸣LUGAL.IR₉.⸢RA ša₂ qe₂-reb⸣ UNUG⸢ki⸣ [10?-1? KUŠ₃ US₂ ANu₂ tu₁₅MAR.TU DA md60-u₂-še-zib]

o 33

[DUMU ša₂ m]dna-na-a-MU 11 [KUŠ₃ US₂ KIu₂ tu₁₅KUR.RA] ⸢DA meš⸣-ḫat ⸢ša₂-ni⸣-tu₄ [TUR₃ u mu-ṣu-u₂]

o 44

[ša₂] ⸢E₂⸣ MU-MEŠ u DA E₂ md60-MUnu u mki-din-d60 DUMU-MEŠ ša₂ mdna-na-a-MU 10 KUŠ₃ SAG.KI ⸢AN⸣.[TA]

o 55

⸢tu₁₅⸣SI.SA₂ DA E₂ md60-u₂-še-zib DUMU ša₂ mdna-na-a-MU 10 KUŠ₃ SAG.KI KI.TA tu₁₅1

o 66

⸢DA⸣ E₂ mdUTU-MUnu u md60-NUMUN-GIŠ DUMU-MEŠ ša₂ mta-nit-tu₄-d60 meš-ḫat ša₂-ni-tu₄ tar-ba-aṣ

o 77

[u] mu-ṣu-u₂ ša₂ E₂ MU-MEŠ 8 KUŠ₃ US₂ ANu₂ tu₁₅MAR.TU DA meš-ḫat IGIti₃ ša₂ E₂ ⸢MU⸣-MEŠ

o 88

8 KUŠ₃ US₂ KIu₂ tu₁₅KUR.RA DA E₂ md60-MUnu u mki-din-d60 DUMU-MEŠ ša₂ mdna-na-a-MU

o 99

⸢6⸣ KUŠ₃ SAG.KI AN.TA tu₁₅SI.SA₂ DA mu-ṣu-u₂ ša₂ E₂ MU-MEŠ a-na SILA u ⸢DA⸣ E₂

o 1010

[m]⸢d60⸣-u₂-še-zib DUMU ša₂ mdna-na-a-MU 6 KUŠ₃ SAG.KI KI.TA tu₁₅1 DA E₂

o 1111

[md60-MUnu] u mki-din-d60 DUMU-MEŠ ša₂ mdna-na-a-MU PAP 2-ta meš-ḫat ša₂ E₂ u TUR₃ MU-MEŠ

o 1212

[E₂] ⸢TUR₃?⸣ u mu-ṣu-u₂ MU-MEŠ i-ṣi u ma-a-du ma-la ba-šu-u₂ gab-bi a-[na]

o 1313

[1/3 MA.NA] ⸢KU₃.BABBAR⸣ is-ta-tir-ri-MEŠ ša₂ ma-⸢lik⸣-sa-an-dar bab-ba-nu-u₂-tu₂ a-na ŠAM₂

o 1414

[TIL]-MEŠ a-na m⸢d⸣na-⸢na⸣-a-MU DUMU ša₂ mdGAŠAN-a-di-e-ḫa-i a-na u₄-mu ṣa-a-tu₄ ⸢it⸣-ta-din

o 1515

[KU₃].BABBAR a₄ 1/3 MA.NA ⸢ŠAM₂⸣ E₂ TUR₃ u mu-⸢ṣu⸣-u₂ MU-MEŠ md60-ŠEŠ-LA₂ DUMU ša₂ mdna-na-a-⸢MU⸣

o 1616

[ina ŠU]-MIN mdna-na-a-MU ⸢DUMU⸣ [ša₂] mdGAŠAN-a-⸢di⸣-e-ḫa-i [ma]-⸢ḫir e⸣-ṭir₃ u₄-mu pa-qa-ri ana muḫ-ḫi

o 1717

⸢E₂ TUR₃⸣ [u mu]-⸢ṣu-u₂⸣ [MU]-⸢MEŠ⸣ [it-tab]-šu-u₂ m⸢d60⸣-[ŠEŠ-LA₂ a]-⸢di⸣ 12-⸢TA⸣-AM₃ u₂-mar-⸢raq⸣-[ma a]-⸢na⸣

Reverse
r 1r 1

m⸢dna-na⸣-[a-MU DUMU ša₂ mdGAŠAN-a]-⸢di⸣-e-ḫa-i ina-an-din E₂ TUR₃ u mu-ṣu-u₂-šu₂ MU-MEŠ

r 22

u₃ KUŠ₃-MEŠ ⸢a⸣-[tar?]-MEŠ ša₂ ina E₂ TUR₃ u mu-ṣu-u₂-šu₂ MU-MEŠ ik-kaš-ši-du-ʾu ša₂

r 33

mdna-na-a-MU ⸢DUMU⸣ ša₂ mdGAŠAN-a-di-e-ḫa-i a-na u₄-mu ṣa-a-tu₄ šu₂-nu

(witnesses)
r 44

lu₂mu-kin₇

r 55

m⸢DU₃a DUMU⸣ [ša₂] map-la-a A mlu-uš-tam-mar-dIŠKUR md60-DINiṭ DUMU ša₂ mla-ba-ši

r 66

A m⸢kur⸣-[i] m[d]60-AD-⸢GUR⸣ DUMU ša₂ mni-din-tu₄-d60 A mḫun-zu-u₂ mina-qi₂-bit-d60 DUMU ša₂

r 77

mri-ḫat-[...] ⸢A mkur⸣-i md60-ŠEŠ-MEŠ-MU DUMU ša₂ mdna-na-a-MU A mŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂-tu₂

r 88

md60-[ik-ṣur] ⸢DUMU⸣ ša₂ mni-⸢din⸣-tu₄-d60 A mlu-uš-tam-mar-dIM mki-din DUMU ša₂ mša₂-d60-šu-u₂

r 99

A ⸢mE₂⸣.[KUR-za-kir] ⸢m⸣d60-DINiṭ DUMU ša₂ md60-ŠEŠ-GAL₂ši A mlu-uš-tam-mar-dIŠKUR

r 1010

m[ba-as]-⸢si-ia⸣ DUMU ša₂ mdINANA-MU-KAM₂ A mE₂.KUR-za-kir mla-ba-ši DUMU ša₂ md60-NUMUN-MU

r 1111

A m⸢E₂.KUR⸣-za-kir mu₂-bar DUMU ša₂ mKAR-d60 A mkur-i mtat-tan-nu A mki-din-d60

r 1212

A mE₂.KUR-za-kir mki-din-d60 DUMU ša₂ mdan-na-at-dGAŠAN A mlu-uš-tam-mar-dIŠKUR

r 1313

[m]⸢ša₂-d⸣60-šu-u₂ DUMU ša₂ mina-qi₂-bit-d60 mDU-A DUMU ša₂ mri-ḫat-d60

uninscribed line
(colophon)
r 1414

[mKI-d60-ḪE₂].NUN lu₂UMBISAG DUMU ša₂ md60-EN-šu₂-nu A md30-TI-ER₂ UNUGki itiNE UD 2-KAM₂

r 1515

[MU x]-KAM₂ man-ti-i-ku-su u mse-⸢lu-ku⸣ LUGAL-MEŠ

lu₂na-din E₂ ⸢TUR₃⸣ u ⸢mu-ṣu-u₂⸣ MU-⸢MEŠ⸣
